message:
feat: capture rustc version at build time via FT_RUSTC_VERSION

Add build.rs logic to capture `rustc --version` output and embed it
as the FT_RUSTC_VERSION env var at compile time. The diagnostic module
now prefers FT_RUSTC_VERSION over the legacy RUSTC_VERSION env var,
ensuring accurate compiler version reporting in doctor output.

Also extracts sqlite_sidecar_path() helper in diagnostic.rs to
correctly compute WAL/SHM/journal paths for databases that don't
use .db extension (e.g., .sqlite3 files where .with_extension()
would produce incorrect paths like "foo.sqlite3-wal" → "foo.sqlite3"
incorrectly replaced).

Tests: assert rust_version is always Some in environment info,
gather_db_health_reads_wal_for_non_db_extension validates sidecar
path logic for .sqlite3 files, updated missing-WAL test to use
.sqlite3 extension.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
